mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (sender_id, receiver_id, product_id, content, is_read) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{productId}, #{content}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.nickname AS sender_nickname FROM message m LEFT JOIN `user` u ON m.sender_id = u.user_id WHERE m.product_id = #{productId} AND ((m.sender_id = #{me} AND m.receiver_id = #{other}) OR (m.sender_id = #{other} AND m.receiver_id = #{me})) ORDER BY m.created_at ASC

SELECT m.*, su.nickname AS sender_nickname, ru.nickname AS receiver_nickname, p.title AS product_title FROM message m LEFT JOIN `user` su ON m.sender_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN `user` ru ON m.receiver_id = ru.user_id LEFT JOIN product p ON m.product_id = p.product_id WHERE m.sender_id = #{userId} OR m.receiver_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 200
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read = 1 WHERE receiver_id = #{me} AND sender_id = #{other} AND product_id = #{productId}
